# GetInsuredBC

> GetInsuredBC is a licensed life insurance broker in British Columbia, Canada. We help BC families find affordable life, critical illness, disability, and funeral insurance through a simple online assessment and one-on-one guidance from a licensed broker.

## About
- Licensed insurance broker serving all of British Columbia
- Based in Vancouver, BC
- Specializes in: life insurance, critical illness insurance, disability insurance, funeral insurance
- Approach: plain-language assessment, multi-provider comparison, no-pressure advice

## Key pages
- [Home](https://getinsuredbc.com/): Overview and coverage assessment
- [How It Works](https://getinsuredbc.com/how-it-works): The 3-step process
- [FAQ](https://getinsuredbc.com/faq): When you need life insurance, how cost is affected by age, how much coverage to get, and why people buy
- [Blog](https://getinsuredbc.com/blog): Guides on life insurance in BC
- [Contact](https://getinsuredbc.com/contact): Reach a licensed BC broker

## Contact
- Email: joel@getinsuredBC.com
- Location: 329 Howe St, Vancouver, BC, Canada
